seasons.name: New Year / Eat Healthier
seasons.content_angle: Start the year with dinner on autopilot — resolution content framed as a system, not willpower. Healthy meal plans, high protein, anti-inflammatory.

seasons.name: Spring / Lighter Meals
seasons.content_angle: Seasonal recipe refreshes. Refresh your meal plan for spring. Light, fresh dinner ideas.

seasons.name: Summer / Grilling
seasons.content_angle: Too hot to think about dinner. Easy summer meals, grilling, no-cook dinners.

seasons.name: Back to School
seasons.content_angle: HIGH VALUE. Parents re-entering structured schedules need meal plans. Back to school meal plan content. Peacekeeper pain intensifies as school schedules compress weeknight windows.

seasons.name: Fall / Comfort Food
seasons.content_angle: Comfort food, crockpot meals, soup season, one-pot meals. Align with seasonal ingredient preferences.

seasons.name: Thanksgiving
seasons.content_angle: Massive Pinterest volume but lower relevance for weekly planning. Minimal investment — maybe one post-Thanksgiving meal plan piece.

seasons.name: Holiday Season
seasons.content_angle: Survive the holidays with a plan. Holiday meal planning, entertaining without stress.
